creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 216684
sysutils_iichid update to 0.0.3

Hi Ivan,

Wouldn't you mind if I replace your patch with sysutils/iichid update to 0.0.3 found in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25538 (it is attached).

It is appeared that aforementioned phabricator patch have to be published in the bugzilla to trigger "maintainer timeout" feature.
